botcomponent.description: This is the FIRST topic every user must go through. Triggered when a user greets, says hi, hello, yes, starts a conversation, or appears for the first time. It collects the student's career profile via an adaptive card and stores all profile variables. This topic should ALWAYS be activated before any other topic. ALWAYS activate this topic when a user sends any greeting or first message. This is the mandatory entry point
botcomponent.name: Student Profile Setup
